DISCOVERY, 302, DEFENDANTS FUAD ATEYEH AND AISHA ATEYEH'S MOTION TO COMPEL PSYCHIATRIC EXAMINATION OF PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION. TO EFFECTUATE THIS ORDER, PARTIES MUST MEET AND CONFER TO AGREE ON A MUTUALLY CONVENIENT TIME FOR THE MENTAL EXAM, WITH MOVING PARTY TO ADVANCE ALL REASONABLE TRAVEL EXPENSES PER CCP SEC. 2032.320(E). PREVAILING PARTY SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT FOR SIGNATURE. JUDGE PRO TEM: CHARLES GEERHART, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2016 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-08-2016 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-08-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-19-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Compel Psychiatric Examinatoin Of Plaintiff
Off Calendar Nov-30-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS FUAD ATEYEH AND AISHA ATEYEH'S Motion To Compel Psychiatric Examination Of Plaintiff is granted. No opposition. To effectuate this order, parties must meet and confer to agree on a mutually convenient time for the mental exam, with moving party to advance all reasonable travel expenses per CCP sec. 2032.320(e). Prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court for signature. Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Motion To Compel Psychiatric Examinatoin Of Plaintiff
Off Calendar Oct-30-2015 Continued To Nov-30-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS FUAD ATEYEH AND AISHA ATEYEH'S Motion To Compel Psychiatric Examinatoin Of Plaintiff is continued to November 30, 2015 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 302, Discovery, per the agreement of parties. Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Motion To Compel Psychiatric Examinatoin Of Plaintiff
